name: unrecognized.device
title: Error Unrecognized Device
description: An error response that indicates a device needs to unenroll.

payloadkeys.content: Indicates that the device is not recognized by the server. This causes the device to unenroll from MDM.
A description of the error. Only use this for logging purposes and don't display it to the user.
A description of the error to display to the user.
